offer: For Etsy sellers processing 10–50 orders/month, inconsistent stock levels cause late orders. We provide an inventory management system instead of manual tracking and spreadsheets.
problem: Inconsistent stock levels lead to late orders and missed sales opportunities.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on inventory management
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Engage in Etsy seller forums and groups
try_it: Let users try stock tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
